commands: sudo bash -lc 'set -e; cd /opt/innercircle/backend; export LANG=C.UTF-8; export LC_ALL=C.UTF-8; export CI=1; export NO_COLOR=1; export PRISMA_HIDE_UPDATE_MESSAGE=1; npm run db:generate; npx prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma; npm run build; sudo systemctl restart innercircle-backend'
